name: desktop-taste
description: Desktop UI/UX taste skills for coding Agents building macOS and Windows applications.

interface.shortDescription: Improve macOS and Windows app UI
interface.longDescription: Desktop Taste helps coding Agents recognize macOS and Windows desktop UI/UX tasks, run a design read brief gate before implementation, bind work to desktop evidence, and route work toward better layout, typography, spacing, density, motion, native feel, product-specific expression, post-implementation QA, and deeper macOS-native guidance including Liquid Glass, SwiftUI scene/window patterns, and narrow AppKit boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Decide whether this UI task belongs to Desktop Taste
Run a Desktop Read brief gate before editing this desktop app UI
Bind desktop UI work to screenshots, runtime, code, DESIGN.md, references, or selected art direction
Apply macOS Native Depth when relevant: Liquid Glass, scene/window roles, toolbar/sidebar/inspector, and AppKit boundaries
Route this desktop UI task to audit, redesign, native feel, layout, typography, motion, brand, QA, or DESIGN.md
